gh.title: GitHub Profile
gh.desc: Personal profile in which i upload my projects to simplify daily problems and self-taught projects

home.p1: Born in 1999 in Alajuela, Costa Rica
home.p2: I am a software developer with experience in developing web and mobile applications.
home.p3: I am passionate about technology and always look for ways to learn new skills and improve my knowledge in the field of programming.
home.p4: Throughout my career, I have worked on a variety of projects, from web applications to mobile applications, using technologies like React and Outsystems.
home.p5: I like to face technical challenges and find creative solutions to solve complex problems.
home.p6: In addition to my technical experience, I also have skills in project management and teamwork.
home.p7: I like to work in a team environment and believe that effective communication is key to the success of any project.
